final_answer: As Isabella Johansson (zip: 32286), here is the complete interaction summary and confirmation of all actions:

plan: Identify the customer: Name is Isabella Johansson, zip code 32286.
State the core problem: An order was shipped to Texas by accident (wrong address).
Note the missing information: The customer does not remember the order number — use name and zip code to look up the order in the system.
Request the tracking number for the incorrectly shipped order once the order is located.
Initiate a return request for all items in the order **except** the pet bed.
Specify the refund method: American Express credit card on file.
Communicate urgency throughout the interaction to prompt priority handling.
If the agent is unable to locate the order, provide the tracking number, process the partial return, or apply the refund to the Amex card — escalate to a human agent immediately.
Confirm all actions taken (tracking number received, return initiated, refund method confirmed) before ending the interaction.
